motion: Should PR #28: epic: Frontend Scaffold & Integration be merged into main?

findings.description: selectTable race condition — concurrent table clicks can corrupt UI state
findings.fix_applied: Monotonic request counter (selectRequestId) guards all state writes in selectTable and goToPage. Commit 5933501.

findings.description: CSV error row is invalid CSV — '# ERROR:' line corrupts downstream parsers
findings.fix_applied: Error comment row removed. tracing::warn logs the event. Commit 5933501.

findings.description: csv::Writer instantiated per row in export loop — 500K Writer allocations
findings.fix_applied: Single csv::Writer hoisted outside loop, flush at batch boundaries. Commit 5933501.

findings.description: CSV export silently delivers truncated files on mid-stream DB error — HTTP 200 committed before spawn, no client-visible truncation signal
findings.fix_applied: Send Err(UnexpectedEof) to tx on stream_error. Commit 7f92f80.

findings.description: goToPage sets currentPage before fetch resolves — on failure, StatusBar shows wrong page number while grid shows stale data
findings.fix_applied: Move currentPage = page to after queryResult = result inside the try block. Commit 7f92f80.

findings.description: Content-Disposition filename not sanitized — display name with quotes or CRLF produces malformed header
findings.fix_applied: Strip double-quote, semicolon, CR, LF from filename before header interpolation. Commit 7f92f80.

findings.description: goToPage/selectTable cross-type race — pagination buttons remain clickable during table switch, can silently cancel in-flight table navigation
findings.fix_applied: Pass loading={tableLoading} to StatusBar; pagination buttons disabled when loading. Council round 4.

findings.description: '1 of 0' pagination display on empty tables — Math.ceil(0/N)=0 but page=1 from backend
findings.fix_applied: Math.max(1, Math.ceil(...)) ensures totalPages >= 1. Council round 4.

dismissed.description: into_inner().unwrap_or_default() silent batch drop in CSV export
dismissed.reason: Unsubstantiated — csv::Writer wraps Vec<u8>; flush() on Vec is infallible; into_inner() after successful flush cannot fail. unwrap_or_default() is dead-code defense.

fixes_applied: Finding 7: pagination disabled during table loading (council round 4)
follow_up_issues: Frontend test infrastructure (zero frontend tests — noted, not blocking)
